patch.value: pm_max_version default-BLOCK should have a per-layer warn-only toggle in settings

loader.ts line 907 has a `// follow-up: pm-4gw6 recommends a future settings toggle to relax this default-BLOCK to warn-only per layer.` comment. Currently pm_max_version exceeded always BLOCKS the extension (allowed: false). This is intentional for safety but creates a footgun for project-layer pinned extensions during a CLI upgrade: the extension silently stops loading until the author publishes a new version. A settings flag like `extensions.policy.pm_max_version_exceeded_mode: 'block'|'warn'` (defaulting to 'block') would let operators running managed installations opt into warn-only during upgrade windows.

- A per-layer setting toggles pm_max_version violation from block to warn
- Default remains block (backward compatible)
- Setting documented + validated; covered by tests
